title: SP8192 Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + TTT (1.1921 BPB)
author: yu314-coder
body:
## Summary
- **val_bpb: 1.1921** (without TTT) / **1.1888** (with TTT)
- SP8192 tokenizer + 11-layer transformer with depth recurrence (17 virtual layers from 11 physical)
- Parallel residuals (GPT-J style), partial RoPE, EMA, score-first test-time training
- Artifact: 15.79 MB (under 16MB limit)

## Key Techniques
- **Depth recurrence:** Layers 3-5 shared and looped 3x, giving 17 virtual layers from 11 physical
- **SP8192 tokenizer:** Better compression per byte than SP1024/4096
- **Parallel residuals:** GPT-J style for layers 7+ 
- **Partial RoPE:** 16/64 head dims use rotary embeddings
- **EMA:** Decay 0.9965, starts at 50% of training
- **TTT:** Score-first chunk-based SGD at eval time (adds ~0.003 BPB improvement)
- **Muon optimizer** for weight matrices + Adam for scalars

## Test plan
- [ ] Reproduce on 8xH100 SXM with `torchrun --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py`
- [ ] Verify artifact size < 16MB
- [ ] Verify val_bpb improvement > 0.005 nats with p < 0.01

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
submission_readme:
# SP8192 Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + TTT

## Configuration
- **Tokenizer:** SP8192 (8192 vocab SentencePiece BPE)
- **Architecture:** 11 physical layers, 512 dim, 8 heads / 4 KV heads
- **Depth recurrence:** Layers 3-5 shared, looped 3x = 17 virtual layers
- **Parallel residuals:** GPT-J style for layers 7+
- **Activation:** LeakyReLU(0.5)^2
- **Partial RoPE:** 16/64 head dims with rotary, rest position-free
- **QK gain:** 5.25 (learnable per-head)
- **Skip connections:** U-Net encoder-decoder with sigmoid-gated skip weights

## Training
- **Optimizer:** Muon (matrices) + Adam (embeddings/scalars)
- **Batch:** 524,288 tokens/step on 8xH100
- **Warmdown:** 72% linear warmdown
- **EMA:** Decay 0.9965, starts at 50% of training
- **Quantization:** int8 per-row + zlib level 9

## Evaluation
- **Test-Time Training:** Score-first chunk-based SGD (lr=0.005, 3 epochs, momentum=0.9)

## Results (8xH100, 10 min)
- val_bpb: **1.1921** (without TTT)
- val_bpb: **1.1888** (with TTT)
- Artifact: 15.79 MB (PASS)
